Get started CLI reference
Guide Merge your first ROOT files Install radd, check ROOT, and run a safe merge. Planning Preview the merge topology Understand chunks, fan-in, commands, and policies. Benchmarking Inspect, validate, and tune Use ROOT metadata and benchmark candidate settings. Reference Look up exact commands Flags for plan, merge, validate, inspect, bench, and cache. Safety Know what radd refuses Overwrite protection, duplicate inputs, and validation behavior. Developer Test real ROOT workflows Run fake-command tests, live ROOT tests, and release checks.
